message:
test(claudeconfig): document Restore behavior when settings file is deleted mid-swarm

Adds TestRestoreRecreatesDeletedSettingsFile to pin down the
adversarial case where an external process (or a rogue swarm agent)
removes settings.json entirely between Snapshot and Restore. The
existing HadModelField=true path calls WriteModel which correctly
recreates a missing file with the pre-swarm model value, so the
user's Claude Code model selection comes back even if sibling
fields (theme, mcp_servers) in their original settings are lost —
a limitation the package doc comment already covers.

Caught during a third-pass review: the behavior was correct but
untested, so a future refactor of WriteModel's file-doesn't-exist
branch could silently regress it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
